selections.name: Isla Delilah
selections.reason: Consistent form with a 3-2-3 record in recent starts. Stepping up in trip suits and has shown enough ability to break through in this maiden field.

selections.name: Classic Shiraz
selections.reason: Produced a strong 2nd last start over 1 3/8m. Fit and ready to peak here, represents a major threat.

selections.name: Crypto Magic
selections.reason: Finished a solid 3rd last start over 1m. The step up in distance looks ideal and draws a favorable barrier.

selections.name: Big Tech
selections.reason: Improved 2nd last start over 1m. Needs to overcome a wider draw but has the tactical speed to be competitive.

danger_horse.name: Classic Shiraz
danger_horse.reason: Excellent recent form over similar distances makes her the primary danger if the top pick falters.

selections.name: Reconciliate
selections.reason: Strong 2nd last start at this track and distance. The Gollan and Jones combination is lethal, and she looks ready to win.

selections.name: Saint Aldwyn
selections.reason: Resuming today. Showed promise on debut with a 2nd place finish. Draws well in barrier 3 and should get a soft run.

selections.name: Under Arrest (NZ)
selections.reason: First-up from a spell. Has trialled consistently and showed good form in previous preparation. Draws perfectly.

selections.name: Bomb Perignon
selections.reason: Waller-trained filly drawing an inside gate. Has the class to feature if she can jump cleanly.

danger_horse.name: Saint Aldwyn
danger_horse.reason: First-up specialist from a top stable with an ideal barrier draw.

selections.name: Laridae
selections.reason: Won impressively last start over this track and distance. Draws the inside rail, giving her a massive tactical advantage.

selections.name: Carravilla
selections.reason: Classy mare who won two starts back. Forgive the last run; she maps perfectly from barrier 3.

selections.name: Eclair Awesome
selections.reason: Finished a close 3rd behind Laridae last start. Meets her better at the weights and will be closing hard.

selections.name: Wild Gypsy
selections.reason: Consistent performer from the Gollan yard. Won two back and has the tactical speed to overcome the middle draw.

danger_horse.name: Carravilla
danger_horse.reason: High-class mare who can easily bounce back to winning form from a soft draw.

selections.name: Superhero
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd last start at Doomben over 1200m. Fitter now, steps up to an ideal trip, and draws perfectly.

selections.name: Hell To Pay
selections.reason: Won well two starts back. Carries top weight but has the class edge and a great inside draw to offset the penalty.

selections.name: Tophet
selections.reason: Consistent form with a 2-1-1 record in recent starts. Narrowly beaten last time and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Snitzond
selections.reason: Honest placegetter drawing the inside rail. Will get the run of the race and represents great exotic value.

danger_horse.name: Hell To Pay
danger_horse.reason: Class runner of the field who can dominate if he handles the weight.

selections.name: Our Mate Locky
selections.reason: Strong 2nd last start showing great improvement. Draws beautifully in barrier 2 and looks ready to break his maiden.

selections.name: Geitz
selections.reason: Very consistent with a 2-4-2 record. Has to overcome a wide gate but possesses the early speed to cross and contend.

selections.name: Amalfi Boy
selections.reason: Solid 3rd last start and gets the ultimate barrier advantage. Will save ground all the way.

selections.name: Don't Doubt Missy
selections.reason: Good 2nd last start. The wide draw is a concern, but she has the raw ability to figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Geitz
danger_horse.reason: Incredibly consistent and will be the one to catch if she crosses from the wide draw without burning too much energy.

selections.name: Music Fever
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after two dominant wins. Maps perfectly from the middle draw and is the clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Cordina
selections.reason: Solid 3rd last start at this track. Draws perfectly in barrier 2 and will get a dream run behind the speed.

selections.name: Divine Source
selections.reason: Finished 4th last start but won well prior. Good barrier ensures she won't do extra work early.

selections.name: Lunar Eight
selections.reason: Forgive the 7th last start; her 2nd prior was excellent. Needs luck from the wide draw but has the class.

danger_horse.name: Cordina
danger_horse.reason: Drawn to get the run of the race and has the turn of foot to upset the favorite.

selections.name: Andi Don't Care
selections.reason: Won brilliantly last start at Doomben. Has a great turn of foot, draws well, and looks primed to go back-to-back.

selections.name: Joy A Plenty
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd last start after a win prior. Draws perfectly and will be right on the speed.

selections.name: Marunouchi
selections.reason: Won on debut at this track. Gets the inside rail and has immense upside. Major threat.

selections.name: Grammar Lad
selections.reason: Solid 4th last start at this track. Needs some luck from the wider gate but has the class to feature.

danger_horse.name: Joy A Plenty
danger_horse.reason: In peak form and maps to get a perfect run just behind the leaders.

selections.name: Tenbury Wells
selections.reason: Ready to peak stepping up to 2000m. Draws beautifully in barrier 3 to save ground and has the class edge.

selections.name: Galway Flyer
selections.reason: Solid 4th last start and won well prior. Gets a dream run from barrier 2 and will be strong late.

selections.name: Delrico
selections.reason: Waller runner who will appreciate the step up in trip. Can bounce back from a flat run last start.

selections.name: Baccarat Rouge
selections.reason: Won last start but has to overcome the extreme outside barrier. Will need a brilliant ride but has the form.

danger_horse.name: Galway Flyer
danger_horse.reason: Drawn perfectly and has the stamina to run out a strong 2000m.
